Rear Side Outer Panel Replacement

Check the rear pillar lower gutter position for damage. If necessary, cut the rear pillar lower gutter, remove the rear combination adapter and the rear combination adapter lower, then replace them.

Replace the quarter pillar outside separator, the rear wheel arch separator, and the rear pillar separator.

The procedure references the rear side outer panel, outer panel, rear inner panel, rear pillar stiffener, quarter pillar stiffener, side sill extension end flange, adhesive application areas, sealer application areas, urethane foam, and hemming.

Welding symbols include 2-plate spot weld, 3-plate spot weld, 4-plate spot weld, MAG plug weld, MAG welding, double hole MIG brazing, and single hole MIG brazing.
